_meta.purpose: Emoji pools organized by sentiment. Engine picks 1-3 emojis randomly from the matching pool. Used at end of review or mid-sentence. NOT every review gets emojis — controlled by client profile emoji.probability setting.
rules: Keep emoji sets feeling natural for Indian review context
5star gets energetic emojis, 3star gets calm/neutral ones
Never use more than 3 emojis in one review
Placement is handled by humanizer.js — not here

combinations._note: Engine can pick a pre-set combination instead of building one randomly. Feels more natural.
